title: ai-squad Delivery Report
description: The chronicler's structured verdict at pipeline end — the 11 product questions answered (as an `answers` map keyed by question key), each anchored in evidence and tagged with a confidence level (recorded | inferred | not_recorded) so unrecorded facts are never invented. Plus per-AC classification and a final verdict. The .md narrative is rendered from this. Read-only by the aiOS cockpit. Top-level additionalProperties is true: the chronicler may carry traceability fields (dispatch_id, gate_dispatch_id, schema_version, generated_at) and consumers ignore what they do not know — but the four required fields and all enums are strict.

confidence.description: recorded = anchored in a direct source; inferred = deduced (must say so in prose); not_recorded = no source (admits the gap, never invents).

evidence_refs.description: dispatch_id, file:line, AC id, test command — the sources that sustain the answer.

squad.description: Optional; consumers may derive it from session.yml.

gate_dispatch_id.description: Traceability: the audit-agent dispatch this report ran after.

answers.description: The 11 product questions, keyed by question key. ALL 11 keys MUST be present (completeness).

acceptance_criteria.description: Per-AC classification against the delivery (the structured form of Q5).
